source_signal: Apple positions Core ML around on-device performance, model conversion, compression, Xcode reports, and Apple silicon execution.
kolm_implication: Treat Core ML as an iOS target backend and benchmark native-vs-kolm claims.

source_signal: Apple provides access to an on-device language model for generation, structured output, and tool calling.
kolm_implication: Do not claim simple Apple-only text generation is uniquely solved by kolm.

source_signal: LiteRT is a high-performance on-device AI framework with conversion, optimization, hardware acceleration, and multiple platforms.
kolm_implication: Make LiteRT a backend target and own the spec/eval/registry layer above it.

source_signal: MediaPipe offers cross-platform task libraries, models, customization, and browser-based evaluation tooling.
kolm_implication: Avoid competing on generic ready-made tasks; focus on custom governed business artifacts.

source_signal: ONNX Runtime documents mobile deployment, execution providers, binary size, model size, latency, power, and optimization flow.
kolm_implication: Publish the same measurement categories for kolm artifacts.

source_signal: ONNX Runtime generate API provides tokenization, pre-processing, search, sampling, KV cache, chat templates, and structured output.
kolm_implication: Kolm needs to show why task artifacts and receipts are valuable beyond an inference loop.

source_signal: ExecuTorch provides a modular workflow for preparing and executing PyTorch programs on-device with backend customization.
kolm_implication: Import PyTorch workflows and treat ExecuTorch as a target, not just a competitor.

source_signal: llama.cpp emphasizes minimal setup and performance across wide local and cloud hardware with many backends and quantization options.
kolm_implication: Offline LLM inference is not enough; kolm should focus on task-specific compiled artifacts.

source_signal: WebLLM uses WebGPU for in-browser local acceleration and an OpenAI-compatible API.
kolm_implication: Browser support claims require explicit compatibility and memory limits.

source_signal: The AI Act applies progressively, including 2025 obligations and wider 2026-2027 applicability.
kolm_implication: Use dated evidence-map language instead of broad compliance wording.

source_signal: HHS frames the Security Rule around safeguards for electronic protected health information.
kolm_implication: Regulated healthcare copy needs controls, ownership, and BAA posture.

source_signal: Qualcomm announced an agreement to acquire Edge Impulse to expand developer enablement and edge AI tooling.
kolm_implication: Edge AI tooling consolidation is a why-now signal and a platform/acquisition proof point.
